description_long: This drone features a streamlined, angular central body with a metallic teal finish and two prominent, circular rotors mounted on extended arms. The main fuselage is reinforced with segmented panels and includes two rectangular white markings near the front, likely for visibility or sensor integration. On either side of the rear, there are large, boxy engine housings with visible blue cylindrical components, suggesting advanced propulsion or cooling systems. The undercarriage is equipped with two sturdy, flat landing skids for stable ground contact. Antennae or sensor rods protrude from the front and rear, enhancing communication or navigation capabilities. The overall design is robust and futuristic, suitable for urban aerial operations and surveillance.
description: A futuristic teal drone with a streamlined body, dual circular rotors, and robust rear engine housings, featuring landing skids and sensor rods.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular teal body, two white panels, and the circular rotors extending outward, with sensor rods visible at the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the segmented body, the flat landing skid, and the large rear engine housing with blue components.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engine housings, blue cylindrical elements, and the symmetrical placement of the rotors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other landing skid, engine housing, and the overall aerodynamic profile.
